subject: feat(charts): expand color palettes from 6 to 20 colors
body:
Charts with many series (contributors, repos, tags) were recycling the
same 6 colors, making items hard to distinguish. Expanded default and
all named presets to 20 perceptually distinct colors. First 6 are
unchanged so existing charts look the same.

Tags: ui, charts
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard-ux
Semver: minor
